title: ophrys olonae
intro: Ophrys olonae, also known as the bee orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae) that mimics the appearance of female bees to attract pollinators. The medicinal properties of Ophrys olonae include its use as a diuretic and a treatment for various gastrointestinal issues, such as indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health due to its flavonoid and phenolic content. Ophrys olonae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopausal disorders.
